key_risks: Hotter-than-expected May CPI or PPI releases on June 10-11 could pressure equities and raise rate-hike odds at June FOMC.
Weaker June employment report on July 2 could trigger broad risk-off rotation before exit close.
Hawkish FOMC outcome on June 17 may lift yields further and weigh on rate-sensitive holdings.

portfolio.rationale: Oil near $90 with EIA inventory draw forecasts and resilient sector 30d returns support outperformance into July.
Defensive sector with +5.23% 30d return, stable demand, and limited sensitivity to near-term rate or inflation volatility.
Net interest margin support from 4.55% 10Y yield and recent FDIC profit data favor banks over the one-month window.
ISM manufacturing PMI at 54.0 signals expansion that can lift industrial names before July 6 exit.

portfolio_rationale: Overweight cyclical defensives and rate-sensitive sectors with positive recent momentum and favorable macro datapoints for the June-July window.
rationale_summary: Energy, healthcare, financials, and industrials positioned to capture inflation pass-through, earnings stability, and manufacturing signals ahead of FOMC and employment data.
